steps.title: Locate the clause boundary
steps.content: "Nora de Hoyos Comstock sought to increase Latina representation in corporate settings" is an independent clause. "She founded Las Comadres para las Americas" is another independent clause.

steps.title: Separate the clauses
steps.content: A fuses the clauses, and B joins them with only a comma. C uses "and" but lacks the comma needed before a coordinating conjunction between two independent clauses. A period correctly separates the two complete sentences. The answer is D.
